name: ArchivableDictionary
summary: Represents a dictionary class that can be attached to objects and can be serialized (saved) at necessity.See remarks for layout.
remarks: This is the layout of this object:.BEGINCHUNK (TCODE_ANONYMOUS_CHUNK)|- version (int)|- entry count (int) for entry count entries |- BEGINCHUNK (TCODE_ANONYMOUS_CHUNK) |- key (string) |- entry contents |- ENDCHUNK (TCODE_ANONYMOUS_CHUNK)ENDCHUNK (TCODE_ANONYMOUS_CHUNK)

constructors.name: ArchivableDictionary()
constructors.summary: Initializes an instance of a dictionary for writing to a 3dm archive.

constructors.name: ArchivableDictionary(Int32)
constructors.summary: Initializes an instance of a dictionary for writing to a 3dm archive.

params.name: version
params.doc: Custom version used to help the plug-in developer determine which version of a dictionary is being written. One good way to write version information is to use a date style integer (YYYYMMDD)

constructors.name: ArchivableDictionary(UserData)
constructors.summary: Initializes an instance of a dictionary for writing to a 3dm archive

params.name: parentUserData
params.doc: parent user data if this dictionary is associated with user data

constructors.name: ArchivableDictionary(Int32, String)
constructors.summary: Initializes an instance of a dictionary for writing to a 3dm archive.

params.name: version
params.doc: custom version used to help the plug-in developer determine which version of a dictionary is being written. One good way to write version information is to use a date style integer (YYYYMMDD)

params.name: name
params.doc: Optional name to associate with this dictionary. NOTE: if this dictionary is set as a sub-dictionary, the name will be changed to the sub-dictionary key entry

methods.name: AddContentsFrom
methods.signature: public bool AddContentsFrom(ArchivableDictionary source)
methods.summary: Add the contents from the source dictionary.

methods.name: Clear
methods.signature: public void Clear()
methods.summary: Removes all keys and values from the dictionary.

methods.name: Clone
methods.signature: public ArchivableDictionary Clone()
methods.summary: Constructs a deep copy of this object.

methods.name: ContainsKey
methods.signature: public bool ContainsKey(string key)
methods.summary: Determines whether the dictionary contains the specified key.

returns.doc: true if the dictionary contains an element with the specified key; otherwise, false.

methods.name: GetBool(String)
methods.signature: public bool GetBool(string key)
methods.summary: Get value as Boolean, will only succeed if value was created using Set(string key, Boolean value)

methods.name: GetBool(String, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool GetBool(string key, bool defaultValue)
methods.summary: Get value as Boolean, will return defaultValue unless value was created using Set(string key, Boolean value)

methods.name: GetBytes(String)
methods.signature: public byte[] GetBytes(string key)
methods.summary: Get value as byte[], will only succeed if value was created using Set(string key, byte[] value)

methods.name: GetBytes(String, Byte[])
methods.signature: public byte[] GetBytes(string key, byte[] defaultValue)
methods.summary: Get value as byte[], will return defaultValue unless value was created using Set(string key, byte[] value)

methods.name: GetDictionary(String)
methods.signature: public ArchivableDictionary GetDictionary(string key)
methods.summary: Get value as ArchivableDictionary, will only succeed if value was created using Set(string key, ArchivableDictionary value)

methods.name: GetDictionary(String, ArchivableDictionary)
methods.signature: public ArchivableDictionary GetDictionary(string key, ArchivableDictionary defaultValue)
methods.summary: Get value as ArchivableDictionary, will return defaultValue unless value was created using Set(string key, ArchivableDictionary value)

methods.name: GetDouble(String)
methods.signature: public double GetDouble(string key)
methods.summary: Get value as double, will only succeed if value was created using Set(string key, double value)

methods.name: GetDouble(String, Double)
methods.signature: public double GetDouble(string key, double defaultValue)
methods.summary: Get value as double, will only succeed if value was created using Set(string key, double value)

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.signature: public IEnumerator<KeyValuePair<string, Object>> GetEnumerator()
methods.summary: Gets the enumerator of this dictionary.

returns.doc: A IEnumerator<T>, where T is an instance of KeyValuePair<TKey, TValue>, with T0 set as string, and T1 as System.Object.

methods.name: GetEnumValue<T>()
methods.signature: public T GetEnumValue<T>() where T : struct, new(), IConvertible
methods.summary: Get an enum value

throws.when: Thrown when the key is not found in the dictionary.
Thrown when the string retrieved from the dictionary is not convertible to the enum type.

methods.name: GetEnumValue<T>(String)
methods.signature: public T GetEnumValue<T>(string key) where T : struct, new(), IConvertible
methods.summary: Get an enum value from the dictionary using a custom key.

throws.when: Thrown when the key is not found in the dictionary.
Thrown when the string retrieved from the dictionary is not convertible to the enum type.

methods.name: Remove
methods.signature: public bool Remove(string key)
methods.summary: Removes the value with the specified key from the dictionary.

params.name: key
params.doc: The key of the element to remove.

returns.doc: true if the element is successfully found and removed; otherwise, false. This method returns false if key is not found.

methods.signature: public bool RemoveEnumValue<T>() where T : struct, new(), IConvertible

methods.signature: public bool ReplaceContentsWith(ArchivableDictionary source)
methods.summary: Replace the contents of the dictionary with that of the given source dictionary.

methods.name: Set(String, ArchivableDictionary)
methods.signature: public bool Set(string key, ArchivableDictionary val)
methods.summary: Sets another ArchivableDictionary as entry in this dictionary.

params.name: val
params.doc: An object for that key. Because this class is a reference type and is mutable, changes to this object will propagate to the object inside the dictionary.It is up to the user to clone this entry when appropriate.

methods.signature: public bool Set(string key, ObjRef val)
methods.summary: Sets a ObjRef

params.name: val
params.doc: An object for that key Because this class is a reference type and is mutable, changes to this object will propagate to the object inside the dictionary.It is up to the user to clone this entry when appropriate.

methods.signature: public bool Set(string key, BoundingBox val)
methods.summary: Sets a BoundingBox.

params.name: val
params.doc: A value for that key. Because BoundingBox has value semantics, changes to the assigning value will leave this entry unchanged.

methods.signature: public bool Set(string key, GeometryBase val)
methods.summary: Sets any class deriving from the GeometryBase base class.

params.name: val
params.doc: A geometry object for that key. Because this class is a reference type and is mutable, changes to this object will propagate to the object inside the dictionary.It is up to the user to clone this entry when appropriate. You can use Duplicate() for this.

methods.name: TryGetValue
methods.signature: public bool TryGetValue(string key, out Object value)
methods.summary: Gets the value associated with the specified key.

params.name: key
params.doc: The key of the value to get.

params.name: value
params.doc: When this method returns and if the key is found, contains the value associated with the specified key; otherwise, null. This parameter is passed uninitialized.

methods.name: TryGetVector3d
methods.signature: public bool TryGetVector3d(string key, out Vector3d value)
methods.summary: Get value as Vector3d, will only succeed if value was created using Set(string key, Vector3d value)

properties.name: ChangeSerialNumber
properties.summary: Retrieve current change serial number. This is a number that gets increased each time a datum is set or changed.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets the number of key/value pairs contained in the dictionary.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets the value associated with the specified key.

properties.name: Keys
properties.summary: Gets all entry names or keys.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name string of this ArchivableDictionary.

properties.name: ParentUserData
properties.summary: If this dictionary is part of user-data (or is a UserDictionary), then this is the parent user data. null if this dictionary is not part of user-data

properties.name: Values
properties.summary: Gets all values in this dictionary.

properties.name: Version
properties.summary: Gets or sets the version of this ArchivableDictionary.
